jobs.job: Full Stack Web Developer & Technical Support
jobs.description: Development and maintenance of web applications using React, Ruby on Rails, and Node.js, along with providing remote technical support.
Full Stack development with Django, Laravel, Node.js, and React. Management of MySQL and PostgreSQL databases. Administration and deployment on Linux servers using Docker and Coolify.
Development of web solutions and automations integrating React, Ruby on Rails, Node.js, and the WhatsApp Business API (WABA).
Full Stack development implementing solutions with Django and Laravel. Design and administration of relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL), and Linux server management.
Application development with Python and Django, along with maintenance and optimization of PHP and MySQL-based websites.
Frontend development of static websites (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) and WordPress management. Creation of desktop applications using C#.
